warnings: PNG contains two portrait sheets (A4, side by side rotated 90 degrees) combined into one landscape scan. This is the physical RIGHT half of the landscape scan (rotate 90 deg counter-clockwise to read), the lower-numbered sheet (แผ่นที่ 1/23 - สรุป/summary), paired with แผ่นที่ 2/23 (หมวดงานโครงสร้าง detail) extracted as _2.json.

This is a blank ปร.4 summary/rollup template: all quantity, unit price, and amount cells for the 5 category rows and the grand-total row are empty in the source (no figures were ever filled in on this page) - none of it was invented; header/label text is transcribed exactly, numeric fields left null per source.
Header fields ประมาณการโดย (estimator name) and ประมาณราคาเมื่อวันที่ (estimate date) are also blank in the source.
Row label 'หมวดงานอื่นๆ...' (item 5) has no 'รวม' unit marker printed next to it, unlike items 1-4 - transcribed exactly as printed.
